name: Hl7VSmanufacturersOfVaccines
title: Manufacturers of Vaccines (code=MVX) (2.4 - 1.1.0)
description: HL7-published value Set of codes that specify the organization that manufactures a vaccine.   Superceded by 2.16.840.1.114222.4.11.826, published by the US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC).
